hooks.command:
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); CODE_CHANGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -cE '\.(tsx?|css|json)$' || true); CHANGELOG_OK=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'CHANGELOG.md' || true); README_OK=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'README.md' || true); CLAUDE_OK=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'CLAUDE.md' || true); ROADMAP_OK=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'ROADMAP.md' || true); if [ "$CODE_CHANGED" != "0" ]; then ERRORS=''; if [ "$CHANGELOG_OK" = "0" ]; then CHANGELOG_MOD=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'CHANGELOG.md' || true); if [ "$CHANGELOG_MOD" = "0" ]; then ERRORS="${ERRORS}CHANGELOG.md has not been updated.
"; else ERRORS="${ERRORS}WARNING: CHANGELOG.md modified but not staged.
"; fi; fi; TYPES_CHANGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'src/types.ts' || true); VIEWER_CHANGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -cE 'Viewer3D|geometryBuilders' || true); RIBBON_CHANGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'RibbonToolbar' || true); EDITOR_CHANGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'ElementEditor' || true); ROUTE_CHANGED=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c 'routes/index' || true); if [ "$TYPES_CHANGED" != "0" ] || [ "$VIEWER_CHANGED" != "0" ] || [ "$RIBBON_CHANGED" != "0" ] || [ "$EDITOR_CHANGED" != "0" ] || [ "$ROUTE_CHANGED" != "0" ]; then if [ "$CLAUDE_OK" = "0" ]; then CLAUDE_MOD=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'CLAUDE.md' || true); if [ "$CLAUDE_MOD" = "0" ]; then ERRORS="${ERRORS}Core files changed (types/viewer/ribbon/editor/routes) but CLAUDE.md not updated. Run /validate-docs to check.
"; fi; fi; fi; if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then printf "$ERRORS"; printf 'Run the /validate-docs command to review and update all documentation before committing.'; exit 1; fi; fi; fi; exit 0
